Definition routed east/north and around instead of using the Al Kharid toll gate object transition; gate primitive crossed west successfully, then replanned from west side.

route_runner halted before Varrock south dark-wizard band: food 3 < required 4 and run energy 22 < required 60; need safer Falador route via Draynor/Port Sarim/Rimmington or stronger run preservation.

Runner for west shortcut target repeatedly moved north/east around Lumbridge/cow-field geometry instead of west/southwest; process was stopped at 3237,3295 with run depleted to ~1. Needs route contract to pass explicit routeSteps/object/collision plan or penalize first-step wrong-way execution.

Saved routeDefinition executed with --route-definition and reached west forest checkpoint; plain route_runner --to had previously replanned incorrectly, so definition execution is required for this shortcut.

Executed generated ML route-definition path from west Lumbridge/Draynor forest to Falador west bank coordinate. Completed without combat or HP loss; run was depleted early, so most later batches walked and emitted run_disabled_after_batch warnings.

Reached the Taverley/White Wolf gate approach from Falador using the generated ML route-definition command. Safe/no combat/no HP loss. Run was spent to 0, which is fine for stopping at the gate but not acceptable before crossing White Wolf Mountain.

manual execution of AI route steps without route_runner reached Catherby arrival radius; White Wolf Mountain contact near 2868,3439, 2861,3494, and 2850,3495; HP 20 to 15; no stall or death; run-energy policy appears suspect because energy fell despite requested walking

AI route definition for local Catherby bank hop had status no-learned-route but actionable true; routeSteps only moved from 2817,3436 to 2815,3436 and did not reach target. Direct primitive walk reached bank area at 2809,3441 but exact target oscillated.

Executed AI routeSteps directly without route_runner. Safe local Catherby bank-to-fishing-shore route reached 2853,3424; no combat or blocker. Hazard warning for taverley_white_wolf_gate_west appears false/stale for this shore leg.
Executed ML1 routeSteps through bridge primitives.

2026-05-25 posthoc review: MrFlame walked the ML1 route steps from west of the Taverley gate to Catherby, had repeated wolf contact, took one 5 HP hit near 2850,3495, did not eat, and arrived at 2817,3436 with HP 15/20 and three kebabs.
Executed ML1 routeSteps through bridge primitives.

ML1 suspicious/no-learned-route short Catherby range-to-bank step oscillated at 2815,3440 instead of reaching bank area. This leg needs door-aware route/object transition evidence, not straight snap movement.

Catherby bank-to-shore ML leg oscillated at start because it did not open/cross the range/bank building door. Proven recovery: stand near 2817,3439, open Door 1530 at 2816,3438, queue walk_path_steps 2817,3438 -> 2818,3438 with allowObjectTransition, then walk to shore.

ML1 catherby_fishing_shore to catherby_range returned no-learned-route with route steps stopping at 2845,3430, far from Range 2728 at 2817,3444. Catherby runner now accepts outside/east tile 2819,3443 when range interactionInRange is true.

Grand tour leg 4 reached the White Wolf/Taverley gate from Catherby but routeSteps treated the closed gate as a walkable target and oscillated at 2935,3451 instead of using the gate object transition. Split this long leg into Catherby -> taverley_white_wolf_gate_west, explicit gate crossing east, then gate east -> Falador.
